title: Ancient DNA reveals Zagros foothills as Bronze Age crossroads of peoples and cultures
description: TEHRAN - The Zagros mountain range and its foothills have long served as a crossroads for the movement of peoples, cultures, and languages. A question that has occupied scholars for decades is whether these cultural influences and population movements were accompanied by significant genetic changes. New research published in Genome Biology, which analyzed the ancient DNA of 17 individuals from the archaeological site of Bakr Awa in Iraqi Kurdistan, located in the western foothills of the Zagros, offers important insights into this question.

title: Celebrate the Summer Solstice at Britain's Ancient Spaces
description: This weekend, the summer solstice will take place across the Northern Hemisphere, and Britain's ancient spaces are the perfect place to celebrate. From Stonehenge to Glastonbury Tor, here are some of the best places to enjoy the longest day of the year.

title: IceCube Links Powerful Neutrino to Ancient Starburst Galaxy
description: Scientists have identified the source of a high-energy neutrino detected by IceCube in 2021. The particle originated from a distant starburst galaxy known as Shadow Blaster, suggesting that intensely...

title: Yoga Day 2026: Unveiling the Ancient Secret, Where Is the True Birthplace of Yoga?
description: India, known as the birthplace of yoga, is set to host the 12th International Day of Yoga on June 21, 2026, under the theme "Yoga for Healthy Ageing." The national celebrations will be led by Prime Minister Narendra Modi at Kolkata’s iconic Red Road, where thousands are expected to participate in the Common Yoga Protocol. The post Yoga Day 2026: Unveiling the Ancient Secret, Where Is the True Birthplace of Yoga? appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .
